title: Wedding Candy Australia: Lolly Buffets and Bonbonniere Ideas
content:
This guide helps you understand wedding candy australia with practical buying tips for Australian shoppers.

Introduction to Wedding Candy Australia

Planning a wedding in Australia involves many delightful decisions, and choosing the perfect wedding candy is certainly one of them! Whether you're setting up a lolly buffet or selecting bonbonniere gifts, the right sweets can add a touch of magic to your special day. In this article, we'll explore a variety of options for wedding candy in Australia, offering you inspiration and practical advice for your big event.

Lolly Buffets: A Sweet Spectacle

Setting Up Your Lolly Buffet

Creating a lolly buffet is a fun and interactive way to engage your guests. To start, consider the theme and colour scheme of your wedding. Choose candy that complements these elements for a cohesive look. For a classic Australian touch, you might include Allen's Fantales, known for their rich caramel flavour encased in chocolate.

  • Choose a variety of candies to cater to different tastes.
  • Use clear glass jars or PVC Transparent Clear Macaron Square Cube Boxes for a stylish display.
  • Label each candy type to match the theme.

You may also want to buy

  • Wedding Hall Musical Water Globe$350
  • PVC Transparent Clear Macaron Square Cube Boxes for Wedding Favour Gift Candy (6X6X6CM) - (Duplicate Imported from WooCommerce)$1.5
  • Rainbow Bonbonniere 8 P/L Chocolate$8

Popular Choices for Lolly Buffets

When it comes to choosing the candy itself, quality and variety are key. Australian favourites like Jolly Ranchers and Nerds can add a burst of colour and flavour to your buffet. Don't forget the crowd-pleasing BIG LOLLY BUDS CARAMEL 850G, which offer a delightful chewy texture.

Bonbonniere Ideas: Memorable Wedding Favours

Choosing the Right Bonbonniere

The tradition of giving bonbonniere is a sweet way to thank your guests. These gifts can be both delicious and decorative. Consider using the Rainbow Bonbonniere 8 P/L Chocolate as a vibrant and tasty option that your guests will love.

Presentation Tips

Presentation is key when it comes to bonbonniere. Use elegant packaging like small boxes or bags tied with ribbon to enhance their appeal. You might also consider the Wedding Hall Musical Water Globe as a charming keepsake for your guests.

Incorporating Local Australian Touches

Embracing local flavours can make your wedding candy selection even more special. Australian chocolates like White Knights Chocolate Mint Chews offer a refreshing twist that stands out. Consider sourcing from local confectioners for a more sustainable and personalised touch.

Practical Tips for Buying Wedding Candy in Australia

  • Order samples before committing to large quantities.
  • Consider dietary restrictions, such as vegan or gluten-free options.
  • Calculate the right amount of candy based on your guest count.

Call to Action

Frequently Asked Questions

What's the difference between a lolly buffet and bonbonniere gifts for a wedding?
A lolly buffet is a self-service display of various candies that guests can enjoy throughout your reception, while bonbonniere are small, individually packaged sweet gifts given to each guest as a thank-you favour. Both can be used together—the buffet provides entertainment and indulgence, while bonbonniere offer a personalised takeaway keepsake.
How much wedding candy should I buy for my Australian wedding?
A general rule is to allow 100-150 grams of lolly buffet candy per guest, depending on your reception length and whether you're serving dessert. For bonbonniere gifts, plan for one favour per guest, typically containing 50-100 grams of quality sweets.
Are Allen's Fantales a good choice for Australian wedding candy?
Yes, Allen's Fantales are an excellent choice for Australian weddings as they're an iconic local brand with a rich caramel and chocolate flavour that appeals to most guests. They're readily available in Australia and add an authentic, nostalgic touch to your celebration.
What's the best way to display lolly buffet candy to match my wedding theme?
Use clear glass jars or transparent boxes like PVC cube boxes to showcase your candy while keeping it fresh and protected. Label each candy type with cards that match your wedding colour scheme and theme, creating a cohesive and elegant display that complements your décor.
How far in advance should I order wedding candy in Australia?
It's recommended to order your wedding candy 6-8 weeks before your event to ensure availability, especially for popular Australian brands and themed packaging. This timeline also allows you to arrange proper storage and preparation of your lolly buffet and bonbonniere displays.
